title: Ashtamangalam Siva Temple
tagline: Ashtamangalam Siva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Ashtamangalam Siva Temple is located in the city of Thrissur at Ashtamangalam in Thrissur district.
overview.description: Ashtamangalam Siva Temple is located in the city of Thrissur at Ashtamangalam in Thrissur district. The presiding deity of the temple is Shiva, located in separate sanctum sanatoriums, facing east. It is believed that this temple is one of the 108 Shiva temples of Kerala and is installed by sage Parasurama dedicated to Shiva. The temple is located near Karyattukara on the Laloor road.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Ayyanthole
topPlaces.description: Ayyanthole is an administrative and residential neighbourhood in the city of Thrissur, Kerala, India. Ayyanthole is the 53rd Ward of Thrissur Municipal Corporation.

topPlaces.name: Laloor
topPlaces.description: Laloor is a residential area situated in the city of Thrissur in Kerala, India. It is Ward 50 of Thrissur Municipal Corporation as of 2020.

topPlaces.name: Aranattukara
topPlaces.description: Aranattukara is a town situated in the city Thrissur, in Kerala, India. Aranattukara is the 51st ward of the Thrissur Municipal Corporation, an Indian civic body.

topPlaces.name: Kanattukara
topPlaces.description: Kanattukara is a ward and residential area in Thrissur, Kerala, India. It is home to the Sankarankulangara Bhagavathy Temple.

topPlaces.name: Ayyanthole Karthyayani Temple
topPlaces.description: Ayyanthole Karthyayani Bhagavathy Temple is a Hindu temple situated in Ayyanthole, Thrissur city of Kerala, India. Cochin Devaswom Board controls the temple.

topPlaces.name: Olarikara
topPlaces.description: Olarikkara, usually called Olari, is an important gateway to Thrissur city of Kerala state, South India. It is a major residential area in the city.

topPlaces.name: Pullazhi
topPlaces.description: Pullazhi or Pullazhy, is a suburban area of Thrissur City in Kerala state, south India. It is almost 6 km away from Swaraj Round.

topPlaces.name: Chettupuzha
topPlaces.description: Chettupuzha is a residential area situated in the City of Thrissur in Kerala state of India. Chettupuzha is Ward 44 of Thrissur Municipal Corporation.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ashtamangalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ashtamangalam Siva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ashtamangalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (62 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ashtamangalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ashtamangalam Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ashtamangalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ashtamangalam Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ashtamangalam Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ayyanthole, Laloor, Aranattukara, Kanattukara, Ayyanthole Karthyayani Temple.
